---
title: Plug-flow reactor computational graph
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    text_representation:
      extension: .qmd
      format_name: quarto
      format_version: '1.0'
      jupytext_version: 1.19.1
  kernelspec:
    display_name: Majordome
    language: python
    name: majordome
---


```{python}
from majordome_utilities.documents import *
from majordome_engineering.symbolic import *
from majordome_utilities.plotting import plot2d

from casadi import SX, Function
import majordome as mj
import cantera as ct
import casadi as cs
import numpy as np
```

```{python}
mech = "gri30.yaml"
mech = "c2h2/graf-2007.yaml"

gas = ct.Solution(mech)
species = gas.species()[0]

T_symbol = SX.sym("T")
P_symbol = SX.sym("P")
Y_symbol = SX.sym("Y", gas.n_species)
```

```{python}
# dir(species)
```

```{python}
species.transport.input_data
```

## Species thermodynamics

```{python}
thermo_sym = symbolic_thermo_factory(species, T_symbol)
thermo_sym
```

```{python}
trans_sym = symbolic_transport_factory(species, T_symbol)
trans_sym
```

## Reaction kinetics

```{python}
reaction = gas.reactions()[3]
reaction.input_data
```

## Mixture thermodynamics

```{python}
all_models = [s.thermo.input_data["model"] for s in gas.species()]
np.unique(all_models).tolist()
```

```{python}
mixture_data = {s.name: symbolic_thermo_factory(s, T_symbol)
                for s in gas.species()}
mixture_data["CH4"].cp(T_symbol)
```

## Reactor model

## Simulation
